_snapshot.notes: All gold derived live from the TEST DB per scripts/search-eval/gold-provenance.md (product-owner-approved 2026-06-18). searchableCorpus = live total_count of public.search_lessons(NULL, ...) and equals count(*) WHERE retired_at IS NULL (both 745). Clusters built by normalized title (lowercased, trimmed, whitespace-collapsed, vertical-tab dropped, & -> and, trailing dup-suffix stripped) plus the spec's explicit twin-pairs; twins counted as one cluster. *Clusters values are string[][] (array of clusters, each an array of lesson_ids). All maxTotalCount guards and sentinel/control counts are LIVE total_counts pinned at snapshot. q12 supervisor pick RESOLVED 2026-06-18 (user/product-owner-confirmed): 5 activity-based PRIMARY clusters frozen (Compost Relay; Compost Relay & Stew twin; Plant Part Olympics; Teamwork Challenge; Teamwork in the Garden). q27 retains its degenerate 'Unknown' ghost row by explicit decision. Deep-verified live 2026-06-18 (8-agent workflow + critic + supervisor spot-check; all PASS). Lesson_ids re-derived live from TEST via the oracle SQL; none invented.

queries.intent: Grade-routed compost lessons for grade 3 (G2 grade-router target).
queries.provenance: gold-provenance.md FROZEN q01; oracle: grade-3 compost (title/summary ILIKE compost, '3' = ANY(grade_levels)). PRIMARY title list per spec. EXCLUDE 'PS 109 Garden Jobs, 10/31-11/2, Plan A'.
queries.provenanceNote: frozen-recall, G2 grade-routed. maxTotalCount = live raw total_count of 'compost lesson for 3rd grade' (744) as baseline-explosion marker; the S1 fix must drop it far below. All PRIMARY titles returned a row.

queries.intent: Garden lessons routed to grade K (G2 grade-router predicate).
queries.provenance: gold-provenance.md PREDICATE q02. normalizedCall {garden, [K]}. Predicate: >=7/10 of top-10 have 'garden' in title/summary OR 'Garden Skills' core_competency.
queries.provenanceNote: predicate. maxTotalCount = live raw total_count of 'garden lessons for kindergarten' (744) as baseline-explosion marker for the G2 router.

predicate.description: >=7/10 of top-10 have 'garden' in title/summary OR carry the 'Garden Skills' core_competency.
predicate.sql: title ILIKE '%garden%' OR summary ILIKE '%garden%' OR 'Garden Skills' = ANY(core_competencies)

queries.intent: Worm/compost lessons routed to grade 2 (G2 grade-router predicate).
queries.provenance: gold-provenance.md PREDICATE q03. normalizedCall {worm composting, [2]}. Predicate: >=7/10 top-10 about worms/compost.
queries.provenanceNote: predicate. maxTotalCount pinned live = 270 (spec '~25' refers to the grade-2-filtered result the router should yield; raw unfiltered 'worm composting for 2nd graders' total_count is 270 today and is the baseline-explosion marker the S1 router must collapse). DEVIATION NOTE: spec text says 'maxTotalCount ~25'; live raw total_count is 270, so the guard is pinned to the live raw baseline (270) per build rule 5 ('isolation/control counts are re-measured live and pinned'). The ~25 is the post-router expectation, recorded in normalizedCall.

predicate.description: >=7/10 top-10 about worms/compost (title/summary ILIKE worm|compost).
predicate.sql: title ILIKE '%worm%' OR title ILIKE '%compost%' OR summary ILIKE '%worm%' OR summary ILIKE '%compost%'

queries.intent: typo recall-RECOVERY probe (C41 PR D): the loose-OR safety net relaxes this near-empty typo query (strict-AND=2, below K_relax=10) back to a broad set, so 'decompasition' recovers some on-topic results in the top-10 instead of near-nothing. Recall-over-precision by design: the broad-token re-flood is ACCEPTED (no maxTotalCount guard); a lenient >=3/10 on-topic bar records the recovery.
queries.provenance: gold-provenance.md PREDICATE q40. Predicate: >=3/10 (lenient) top-10 about compost/decomposition/food-waste. Was the C41 typo recall-cliff CANARY (PR-D trigger); REPURPOSED 2026-06-29 (Session 4, user-confirmed) to a recall-recovery probe after PR D shipped — dropped the maxTotalCount guard (relaxes+floods by design) and set the bar to the measured 3/10.
queries.provenanceNote: predicate. C41 PR D typo recall-RECOVERY probe (was the recall-cliff canary that triggered PR D). PR D relaxes it (strict-AND=2 < K=10) to the loose-OR fallback -> 568 results, 3/10 on-topic; the re-flood is by design so NO maxTotalCount guard. Lenient >=3/10 records that the typo query recovers some relevant lessons via relax.

predicate.description: >=3/10 top-10 about compost/decomposition/food-waste (title/summary ILIKE 'compost|decompos|food waste|food scrap|recycl'). Lenient: typo recall-RECOVERY probe (PR D relax restored a non-trivial result set).

queries.provenanceNote: predicate. C41 stop-word-middle probe - the FTS stop word 'of' reaches SQL and must be dropped via numnode=0; reads red on the flat-OR before-baseline by design; maxTotalCount 100 post-C41 target (decay~60; tunable once after-numbers land).

predicate.description: >=6/10 top-10 about compost/decomposition/decay/food-waste (title/summary ILIKE 'compost|decompos|decay|food waste|food scrap|recycl').
predicate.sql: title ILIKE '%compost%' OR summary ILIKE '%compost%' OR title ILIKE '%decompos%' OR summary ILIKE '%decompos%' OR title ILIKE '%food waste%' OR summary ILIKE '%food waste%' OR title ILIKE '%food scrap%' OR summary ILIKE '%food scrap%' OR title ILIKE '%recycl%' OR summary ILIKE '%recycl%' OR title ILIKE '%decay%' OR summary ILIKE '%decay%'
